body:
## Summary
Adds a "Dark mode" toggle to the settings page.

- New **Dark mode** checkbox in the settings section of `settings.html`.
- `src/settings.js` now applies the dark theme immediately when toggled and restores the saved preference on page load. It also restores the state of the existing checkboxes from `localStorage` on load.
- `src/styles.css` adds a `body.dark` theme (dark background, light text) with a smooth transition.

The preference persists in `localStorage` under the `darkMode` key, consistent with the existing settings.

## Testing
Manual: open `settings.html`, toggle Dark mode, confirm the page switches themes and the choice survives a reload.

Closes #1

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Add a dark-mode toggle to the settings page
